mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PENDING_ACCEPT', 'IN_PROGRESS') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' AND YEAR(actual_complete_time) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(actual_complete_time) = MONTH(NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthlyCompleted FROM wo_work_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND repair_user_id = #{repairUserId}
SELECT * FROM wo_work_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND status = 'PENDING_ACCEPT' AND update_time <= #{returnTime} AND cancel_reason IS NULL

SELECT wo.id, wo.order_no AS orderNo, wo.order_type AS orderType, wo.status, wo.description, wo.create_time AS createTime, wo.actual_complete_time AS actualCompleteTime, CASE WHEN wo.address_type = 'HOUSE' THEN CONCAT(bc.community_name, ' ', bb.building_name) ELSE CONCAT(bc.community_name, ' ', bb.building_name, '（公共区域）') END AS addressDesc FROM wo_work_order wo LEFT JOIN bs_community bc ON wo.community_id = bc.id LEFT JOIN bs_building bb ON wo.building_id = bb.id WHERE wo.del_flag = 0 AND wo.repair_user_id = #{repairUserId} AND wo.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'FORCE_CLOSED') ORDER BY wo.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wo_work_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND community_id = #{communityId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wo_work_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND building_id = #{buildingId} AND status IN ('PENDING_DISPATCH', 'PENDING_ACCEPT', 'IN_PROGRESS')
SELECT * FROM wo_work_order WHERE del_flag = 0 AND reporter_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
